jobs.name: 每日9点黄金中长线内参

payload.message: Use skill gold-market-report to generate today 09:00 gold report. Must call market_get_xauusd_snapshot first and treat GoldAPI values as the only numeric truth source. Enforce factor-driven analysis (macro + flow + narrative + structure), include 3-day/7-day continuity review, and write archive markdown to ~/.openclaw/workspace/reports/gold/. If narrative is mostly unchanged, report only incremental changes and confidence/invalidations. Hard gate: if timestamp is non-today, switch to snapshot-only mode and do not claim confirmed today drivers. Output Chinese, Telegram-ready, strict format per skill.

jobs.name: 每日1700港股科技收盘总结

payload.message: Use skill hk-tech-close-report to generate today Hong Kong tech close report. Must call market_get_hstech_quote first and use it as the only numeric truth source for HSTECH close data. Enforce factor-driven engine (discount-rate, southbound flow, weight structure, policy narrative, risk sentiment) with factor scoring and a clear dominant-factor conclusion. Require adaptive delta-first output, 3-day/7-sample continuity review, unique markdown archive to ~/.openclaw/workspace/reports/hk-tech/, and state updates for last/history tracking. Hard gate: if freshness is non-today, output snapshot mode only and never claim confirmed same-day close drivers. Output Chinese, Telegram-ready, strict format per skill.

Use skill `ai-news-daily` to generate today's AI ecosystem daily brief.
Focus on past 12-24h deltas only; prioritize models, open-vs-closed competition, hardware, and builder tools.
Output in Chinese, Telegram-ready, with plain-language explanations and trend takeaway.

Research execution rule (strict):
- All web research must be executed via OpenClaw agent tools (not direct lightweight web lookup).
- OpenClaw web_search is the primary retrieval backend (provider: Perplexity Sonar).
- Perform deep search + cross-source verification before writing conclusions.
- If web_search is unavailable, do not guess; explicitly report data-collection failure and stop.

Use skill `geopolitics-night-brief` to generate tonight's geopolitical bedtime brief.
Hard requirements: explain root causes and historical context in plain Chinese, and include last-night vs tonight delta.
Output Telegram-ready strict format with clear fact-vs-inference labels and tomorrow watchpoints.

Research execution rule (strict):
- All web research must be executed via OpenClaw agent tools (not direct lightweight web lookup).
- OpenClaw web_search is the primary retrieval backend (provider: Perplexity Sonar).
- Perform deep search + cross-source verification before writing conclusions.
- If web_search is unavailable, do not guess; explicitly report data-collection failure and stop.

Use skill `gaming-night-brief` to generate tonight's gaming industry bedtime brief.
Must cover multi-platform signals (mobile/TapTap, console, PC/platform) and highlight only real 12-24h deltas.
Output Telegram-ready strict format with plain-language explanations, forward watchlist, and explicit uncertainty tags for unconfirmed items.

Research execution rule (strict):
- All web research must be executed via OpenClaw agent tools (not direct lightweight web lookup).
- OpenClaw web_search is the primary retrieval backend (provider: Perplexity Sonar).
- Perform deep search + cross-source verification before writing conclusions.
- If web_search is unavailable, do not guess; explicitly report data-collection failure and stop.

Use skill btc-daily-report to generate today BTC daily report. Mandatory: BTC/USD numeric data and technical metrics must come from Twelve Data API (not web pages), and output must include data-source section with Twelve Data endpoints and fetch timestamp. Must include teaching layer: pick 1-2 terms from today report and explain each with one-line definition, plain-language translation, today usage, and common misunderstanding. Add up to 2 learning actions (beginner + advanced). News/catalyst layer should use OpenClaw web_search with deep cross-source verification. Output in Chinese, Telegram-ready, strict format per skill.
Hard gate: if freshness is 历史快照（非今日）, switch to snapshot-only interpretation and do not claim confirmed today market drivers.

Use skill fund-portfolio-daily-report to generate today's multi-fund portfolio report. Must call fund_portfolio_daily first and treat tool output as the only numeric truth source. Output in Chinese, Telegram-ready, plain-language style for non-professional users. Include: one-line summary, portfolio PnL, top contributors/detractors, and near-term outlook. Calendar gate is mandatory: if validTodayCount==0 then use non-trading snapshot mode; weekend/holiday should switch to next-week outlook mode and never claim confirmed same-day move.
Use skill openclaw-housekeeping. Run apply mode once weekly and report concise cleanup summary. If script fails, output error and stop.
